resources.string: The objective of the puzzle is to convert one word to another - at each step you can change only one letter and each word must be a valid word.
The built-in dictionary is based on the Official Collins Scrabble Words (2019)\nIt contains 279496 words and this app can generate over 1.5 million different puzzles.
With Hints turned on (see menu) the app will give you some help in finding the word for each step. Use the keyboard buttons...
to fill in the entire word that could fit at the current step.
(on a letter) tips will appear to suggest what letter(s) can be at that position in the word.
(on an empty step) to display which letter positions can be changed.
Use the keyboard to enter a word at each step. Tap to the left or right of each step edit to nudge the selected character
With Hints turned on you will also be able to see all of the possible solutions found.

string.name: help_5b
string.i: Note that using these Hints will aggressively deduct from your overall score and looking at possible solutions will wipe out your current score.

resources.string: To find the meaning of a word use the Word lookup…\ option from the menu.
Hold finger down on any word entry, start word, end word or solution word display to show the meaning of that word.
